title: Half-Life
description: Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

localized_description.text: Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Nombrado juego del año por más de 50 publicaciones, la ópera prima de Valve mezcla acción y aventuras con una tecnología galardonada con varios premios, en un mundo terriblemente realista en el que los jugadores deberán esforzarse por sobrevivir. También incluye un emocionante modo multijugador que te permite jugar contra amigos y enemigos de todo el mundo.

Nommé « Jeu de l'année » par plus de 50 magazines, ce titre de Valve mêle action et aventure grâce à une technologie primée et crée un monde au réalisme effrayant, où la survie des joueurs dépend de leur faculté de réflexion. Il comprend également un mode multijoueur qui permet aux amis et ennemis du monde entier de s'affronter au cours de parties acharnées.

Das von über 50 Magazinen zum Spiel des Jahres gekürte Spiel-Debüt von Valve ist eine Kombination aus Action und Adventure mit preisgekrönter Technologie, die eine beängstigende realistische Welt entstehen lässt, in der die Spieler Köpfchen brauchen, um zu überleben. Es gibt auch einen Mehrspielermodus, in dem Sie mit Spielern aus der ganzen Welt oder gegen sie spielen können.

Considerado Jogo do Ano por mais de 50 revistas, o título de estreia da Valve mistura ação e aventura com uma tecnologia galardoada para criar um mundo assustadoramente realista, onde os jogadores devem pensar para sobreviver. Também inclui um emocionante modo multi-jogador que permite que jogues contra amigos e inimigos em todo o mundo.

Valves debuttitel er kåret som Årets spil af over 50 publikationer og forener action og eventyr med prisvindende teknologi for at skabe en skræmmende realistisk verden, hvor spillerne skal tænke for at overleve. Spillet indeholder desuden en spændende multiplayer-tilstand, hvor du kan spille imod venner og fjender fra hele verden.

Giudicato "Gioco dell'anno" da più di 50 pubblicazioni, il titolo di debutto Valve abbina azione e avventura a una premiata tecnologia in grado di creare un mondo dal realismo impressionante, dove pensare è la chiave per la sopravvivenza. Il titolo include inoltre un'emozionante modalità multigiocatore che permette di giocare contro amici e nemici in tutto il mondo.

Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Dr. Gordon Freeman doesn't speak, but he's got a helluva story to tell. This first-person roller-coaster initiated a new era in the history of action games by combining engrossing gameplay, upgraded graphics, ingenious level design and a revolutionary story that may not be all that it seems, told not through cutscenes, but through the visual environment.

Dr. Gordon Freeman arrives late for work at 8:47 am in the Black Mesa Research Facility, using the advanced Black Mesa tram system that leads through the facility. He arrives at the Anomalous Materials Lab, his work place, and he is informed by the security officer that the scientists have a special experiment today, so he goes to the locker room and puts on the hazard suit. He goes to the lab's lower levels, and arrives at the Anti-Mass Chamber, where he is instructed that the specimen to be used that day is the rarest and also the most unstable specimen. He is tasked with pushing the specimen into the scanning beam of the Anti-Mass Spectrometer for analysis. However as soon as he pushes it, it explodes, and creates a sudden catastrophe called a "resonance cascade", opening a portal between Earth and a dimension called Xen. Freeman is apparently teleported to an alien planet and catches glimpses of various alien lifeforms, including a circle of Vortigaunts, shortly before blacking out.

title: Bad End Theater
description: Welcome to Bad End Theater! Select your protagonist and explore a variety of terrible fates! The decisions you make in one story will affect the others. you can toggle these behaviors to open up new paths! unfortunately, every path leads to a bad ending... Can you find a way to save this unlucky cast? Playtime: 2-3 hours to see all endings (it's a puzzle game, so this varies widely).

title: Hollow Knight
description: A 2D metroidvania with an emphasis on close combat and exploration in which the player enters the once-prosperous now-bleak insect kingdom of Hallownest, travels through its various districts, meets friendly inhabitants, fights hostile ones and uncovers the kingdom's history while improving their combat abilities and movement arsenal by fighting bosses and accessing out-of-the-way areas.

title: Sharin no Kuni: The Girl Among the Sunflowers
description:
Early summer.

A society which imposes special "Duties" upon everyone who breaks the law.

The individuals who oversee these criminals' rehabilitation are the "Special Elite"ーa rank the protagonist, Kenichi Morita, hopes to attain. To do that, he must pass his final exam, for which he arrives at a certain country town.

At the school Kenichi attends, he encounters girls bound by various “Duties.” Those obligated "to observe a 12-hour day" are forbidden from being awake for more than 12 hours per day, and those obligated "to remain in infancy" cannot grow up. It is meeting Natsumi Hinata, the girl who "cannot fall in love," that throws him out of gear.

Soon, Kenichi makes a series of odd discoveries… his own grave, erected secretly on a clifftop; his patrimony, hidden deep inside a cavern. Kenichi finds that he must search for his own atonement in this dystopian society. What is the truth behind the Land of the Spinning Wheel? Discover for yourself through Kenichi's eyes!

title: Yume Nikki
description:
Yume Nikki is a 32-Bit freeware game created by Kikiyama, a Japanese solo game designer. The game was made using RPGMaker 2003. The game is regarded as one of the most original applications of RPGMaker 2003, and the start of a possible new genre of games.

"Yume Nikki" means "Dream Diary" in Japanese, and the game follows a young girl named Madotsuki as she dreams. The goal is to seek out and acquire all 24 'Effects'.

The game otherwise has no plot, and nearly the entire game is left up to speculation.

The story of Yume Nikki is mostly up to the player's interpretation. All we know for sure is that Madotsuki, the game's silent protagonist, lives alone in her apartment which she refuses to leave and which contains a desk, a single Famicom game console, a balcony, and, most importantly, a bed. Upon going to bed, Madotsuki explores her dreams, a surreal world full of illogically connected, smaller worlds to gather "effects." What exactly these dreams and effects represent in Madotsuki's personal life is, again, up to interpretation. Even Madotsuki's name, a name that isn't a real name in Japan, is entirely up to interpretation.

title: Life is Strange
description:
Life is Strange is a five part episodic game that sets out to revolutionize story based choice and consequence games by allowing the player to rewind time and affect the past, present and future.

You are Max, a photography senior who saves her old friend Chloe by discovering she can rewind time. The pair soon find themselves exposed to the darker side of Arcadia Bay as they uncover the disturbing truth behind the sudden disappearance of a fellow student. Meanwhile, Max begins to have premonitions as she struggles to understand the implications of her power. She must quickly learn that changing the past can sometimes lead to a devastating future.

  About the Game

 Life is Strange is an award-winning and critically acclaimed episodic adventure game that allows the player to rewind time and affect the past, present and future.  
 
 Follow the story of Max Caulfield, a photography senior who discovers she can rewind time while saving her best friend Chloe Price.
 The pair soon find themselves investigating the mysterious disappearance of fellow student Rachel Amber, uncovering a dark side to life in Arcadia Bay. Meanwhile, Max must quickly learn that changing the past can sometimes lead to a devastating future. Key Features:

  Acerca del juego    
  ¡Primer episodio gratis! 
 
 Life Is Strange es una aventura por episodios premiada y elogiada por la crítica que te permite retroceder en el tiempo y cambiar el pasado, el presente y el futuro.
 
 Sigue la historia de Max Caulfield, una estudiante de fotografía que descubre que es capaz de retroceder en el tiempo al salvar a su mejor amiga, Chloe Price.
 Juntas comienzan a investigar la misteriosa desaparición de otra estudiante, Rachel Amber, y pronto descubren el lado más oscuro de Arcadia Bay. Max debe aprender cuanto antes que cambiar el pasado a veces puede traer consecuencias desastrosas en el futuro. Características principales: 
   Un juego de aventuras moderno con una narrativa excelente.
   Retrocede en el tiempo para cambiar el curso de los acontecimientos.

 Retracez l’histoire de Max Caulfield, une étudiante en photographie, qui découvre, en sauvant la vie de sa meilleure amie, Chloe Price, qu’elle peut remonter dans le temps.
 Les deux jeunes filles se retrouvent très vite à enquêter sur la mystérieuse disparition d’une autre étudiante, Rachel Amber, révélant le côté sordide d’Arcadia Bay.  Life is Strange è un'avventura grafica a episodi premiata e apprezzata dalla critica in cui il giocatore può riavvolgere il tempo e cambiare passato, presente e futuro.
 
 Segui la storia di Max Caulfield, una studentessa di fotografia che, salvando la vita alla sua migliore amica Chloe Price, si accorge di avere lo straordinario potere di riavvolgere il tempo.
 
 Mentre indagano sull’improvvisa sparizione della loro compagna di scuola Rachel Amber, le due amiche si rendono conto che la cittadina di Arcadia Bay ha un lato oscuro. Max scoprirà presto fino a che punto cambiare il passato può compromettere il futuro. Caratteristiche: 
   Un’avventura moderna scritta magnificamente.
   Riavvolgi il tempo e modifica il corso degli eventi.
   Finali multipli determinati dalle scelte del giocatore. 
   Bellissime immagini disegnate a mano.
   Colonna sonora indie.

title: Persona 3 Reload
description:
Step into the shoes of a transfer student thrust into an unexpected fate when entering the hour "hidden" between one day and the next. Awaken an incredible power and chase the mysteries of the Dark Hour, fight for your friends, and leave a mark on their memories forever.

Persona 3 Reload is a captivating reimagining of the genre-defining RPG, reborn for the modern era.

Life doesn't always go as planned, and you—as the protagonist—transfer into Gekkoukan High School, located at the center of the man-made Tatsumi Port Island only for a terrifying creature to attack your dorm.

In the midst of chaos, you awaken to your Persona—a powerful force that can be used to fight back.

A group of others who share this power recruit you into their Specialized Extracurricular Excecution Squad (S.E.E.S.), and so begins your journey to uncover the mysteries behind these incidents...

title: Alice: Madness Returns
description: Return to Wonderland and experience an all new nightmare as Alice fights to regain her sanity as she fights for the truth behind her past. Can Alice save Wonderland — and herself — from the madness that consumes them both?

localized_title.text: 愛麗絲驚魂記：瘋狂再臨
Alice : Retour au pays de la folie
アリス マッドネス リターンズ

localized_description.text: Return to Wonderland and experience an all new nightmare as Alice fights to regain her sanity as she fights for the truth behind her past. Can Alice save Wonderland — and herself — from the madness that consumes them both?

Eleven years ago a horrific fire took Alice’s family from her and left her mind horrifically scarred. Afterwards she was confined to Rutledge Asylum, where she struggled to confront her demons by slipping further into her fantasy world of Wonderland. Now, after ten years, she has finally secured her release—yet she still bears the heavy psychological burden of that tragic event.
 
 With her mind in tatters, she is unable to resolve the fear prompted by her strange memories, dreams, and visions. Perhaps she’ll do better in Wonderland. She always has. She travels there, seeking what the “real” world can’t provide: security, knowledge, and the truth about the past. But in her absence, Wonderland too has suffered. Something has gone horribly wrong, and now a great evil is descending upon what once was her beautiful refuge. Can Alice save Wonderland—and herself—from the madness that consumes them both?
 					 Key Features: 					 Intense 3rd person action: 
 					  Use multiple upgradeable melee weapons, including the explosive Teapot Cannon, the punishing Hobby Horse, and the classic Vorpal Blade.
 					   Explore a dark and shattered Wonderland: 
 					  Encounter familiar but now strange characters, including the Cheshire Cat, the Mad Hatter, the Caterpillar and the Red Queen.
 					   Magical abilities: 
 					  Obtain peculiar abilities in Wonderland such as floating with Alice’s dress, shrinking, or growing to towering sizes in order to crush enemies.
 					   Interactive puzzles: 
 					  Intuitive and rewarding puzzles such as transforming obstacles, musical memories, chess, and picture blocks.

Hace once años un pavoroso incendio acabó con la familia de Alicia y la dejó terriblemente trastornada. Más tarde fue internada en el Manicomio Rutledge, donde sufrió para hacer frente a sus demonios adentrándose aún más en su mundo de fantasía, el País de las Maravillas. Ahora, después de diez años, finalmente ha logrado asegurar su liberación. Pero aún carga con el gran daño psicológico de aquel trágico evento.
 Con su mente hecha jirones, es incapaz de enfrentarse al miedo provocado por sus extraños recuerdos, sueños y visiones. Quizás lo haga mejor en el País de las Maravillas. Siempre ha sido así. Suele viajar allí buscando lo que el mundo "real" no le puede proporcionar: seguridad, conocimiento y la verdad acerca del pasado. Pero durante su ausencia, el País de las Maravillas también ha sufrido lo suyo. Algo ha ido terriblemente mal y ahora una gran maldad se cierne sobre lo que antaño fuera su hermoso refugio. ¿Puede Alicia salvar al País de las Maravillas (y a ella misma) de la locura que los consume? Características Principales:  Intensa acción en tercera persona: 
   Utiliza múltiples armas cuerpo a cuerpo mejorables, incluyendo el Cañón Tetera, el Caballo Hobby castigador y la clásica Hoja Vorpal.   Explora un País de las Maravillas oscuro y destrozado: 
   Encuentra personajes familiares pero ahora extraños, incluyendo el Gato Cheshire, el Sombrerero Loco, la Oruga y la Reina Roja.   Habilidades mágicas: 
   Obtén peculiares habilidades en el País de las Maravillas como la capacidad de flotar con el vestido de Alicia, encogerte y crecer hasta un tamaño gigantesco para aplastar a tus enemigos.   Puzles interactivos: 
   Intuitivos y gratificantes puzles como la transformación de obstáculos, los recuerdos musicales, el ajedrez y los bloques de imágenes.

Onze ans plus tôt, un terrible incendie a emporté la famille d’Alice et a laissé d’effroyables cicatrices dans son esprit. À la suite du drame, elle a été internée à l’asile de Rutledge, où elle a lutté contre ses démons en s’enfonçant de plus en plus dans son monde imaginaire du Pays des Merveilles. Dix ans plus tard, Alice est enfin autorisée à sortir, mais elle porte encore le lourd fardeau psychologique de ce tragique évènement.
 Son esprit en lambeaux, elle est incapable d’affronter la peur que provoquent ses étranges souvenirs, rêves et visions. Peut-être s’en sortira-t-elle mieux au Pays des Merveilles. Ça a toujours été le cas. Elle se rend là-bas à la recherche de ce que le monde « réel » ne peut pas lui offrir : sécurité, connaissance, et vérité sur le passé. Mais en son absence, le Pays des Merveilles a, lui aussi, souffert. Quelque chose a mal tourné, et maintenant un grand mal s’abat sur ce qui fut son refuge magnifique. Alice peut-elle sauver le Pays des Merveilles (ainsi qu'elle-même) de la folie qui les ronge tous les deux ? Caractéristiques :  Intense jeu d’action à la 3ème personne : 
   Utilisez toute une gamme d’armes de mêlée à améliorer, dont le Canon Théière explosif, Le Cheval de Bataille vengeur, la classique Épée Vorpale.   Explorez un Pays des Merveilles sombre et brisé : 
   Rencontrez des personnages familiers devenus étranges, notamment le Chat du Cheshire, le Chapelier Fou, La Chenille et la Reine Rouge.   Pouvoirs magiques : 
   Obtenez des pouvoir magiques propres au Pays des Merveilles tels que flotter avec la robe d’Alice, rapetisser ou grandir à des tailles impressionnantes afin d’écraser vos ennemis.   Puzzles interactifs : 
   Puzzles intuitifs et encourageants comme des obstacles à transformer, des jeux de mémoire musicaux, les échecs et des blocs d’images à assembler.

Vor elf Jahren nahm ein fürchterliches Feuer Alice die Familie und hinterließ tiefe Narben in ihrem Geist. Sie wurde in der Rutledge-Irrenanstalt weggesperrt, wo sie sich mühte, ihre Dämonen zu bekämpfen, dabei aber immer tiefer in ihre Fantasiewelt abglitt – ins Wunderland. Jetzt, nach zehn Jahren, wird sie endlich entlassen – trägt jedoch noch immer schwer an der Last der Tragödie.
 Ihr Verstand ist zerschmettert; sie kann die Angst, die durch seltsame Erinnerungen, Träume und Visionen genährt wird, nicht zähmen. Vielleicht ginge es ihr im Wunderland besser. So wie früher. Sie reist dorthin und sucht, was ihr die "Realität" nicht bieten kann: Sicherheit, Erkenntnis und die Wahrheit über die Vergangenheit. Während ihrer Abwesenheit hat allerdings auch das Wunderland leiden müssen. Irgendetwas ist gehörig schiefgegangen, und jetzt sucht eine böse Macht ihren einstigen Zufluchtsort heim. Kann Alice das Wunderland – und sich selbst – vor dem Wahnsinn bewahren, der beide zerfrisst? HAUPTEIGENSCHAFTEN:  Intensive 3rd-Person-Action: 
   Verschiedene verbesserungsfähige Waffen, inklusive der explosiven Teekannone, dem vergeltenden Steckenpferd und der klassischen Vorpal-Klinge.   Erkunden Sie ein düsteres und erschüttertes Wunderland: 
   Begegnen Sie vertrauten, nun jedoch befremdlichen Geschöpfen wie der Grinsekatze, dem Hutmacher, der Raupe und der Roten Königin.   Magische Fähigkeiten: 
   Eignen Sie sich im Wunderland besondere Fähigkeiten an: beispielsweise das Gleiten mit dem Kleid von Alice, das Schrumpfen oder auch das Wachsen ins Riesenhafte, um Gegner zu zerschmettern.   Interaktive Rätsel: 
   Intuitiv zu lösende und erhellende Rätsel wie das Manipulieren von Hindernissen, das Einprägen von Musik, Schach- und Blockpuzzle-Aufgaben.

Há onze anos atrás um horrível incêndio levou a família de Alice, o que lhe deixou a mente horrivelmente cicatrizada. Mais tarde ela foi mandada para o manicómio de Rutledge, onde ela tentou confrontar os seus demónios, deslizando ainda mais num mundo de fantasia no País das Maravilhas. 
 Ao fim de dez anos, ela finalmente pôde sair, mas ainda assim ela ainda carregava o pesado fardo psicológico daquele evento trágico.
 Com a sua mente em farrapos, ela é incapaz de resolver o medo instigado pelas suas memórias estranhas, sonhos e visões. Talvez ela esteja melhor no País das Maravilhas. Ela sempre esteve. Ela viaja para lá, procurando o que o mundo "real" não lhe pode fornecer: o conhecimento, segurança e a verdade sobre o passado. Mas, na sua ausência, o País das Maravilhas também sofreu. Algo errado aconteceu, e agora um grande mal está a descer sobre o que já foi seu bonito refúgio. Poderá a Alice salvar o País das Maravilhas e de si mesma à loucura que consome ambos? Características principais :  Ação intensa na terceira pessoa: 
   Usa várias armas modificáveis ​de corpo a corpo, incluindo o explosivo Teapot Cannon, o implacável Hobby Horse e a clássica Vorpal Blade.   Explora o mundo negro e arruinado do País das Maravilhas: 
   Encontra personagens familiares, mas agora estranhas, incluindo o Gato de Cheshire, o Chapeleiro Louco, a Lagarta e a Rainha Vermelha.   Habilidades mágicas: 
   Obtém habilidades peculiares no País das Maravilhas, tais como flutuar com o vestido de Alice, encolher, ou crescer para tamanhos enormes para esmagares os inimigos.   Quebra-cabeças interativos: 
   Quebra-cabeças intuitivos e recompensadores como obstáculos que se transformam, memórias musicais, xadrez e blocos de imagens.

11年前の凄惨な火事が、アリスから家族を奪い、彼女の心に恐ろしい傷跡を残しました。その後彼女は、ラトリッジ閉鎖病棟に閉じ込められました。そこで彼女は不思議の国の幻想的な世界へ入り込み、彼女自身の悪魔に立ち向かいました。10年後の今、彼女はついに解放されました……しかし彼女はまだその悲劇的な出来事の心理的な重荷を背負っています。
 彼女の心はずたずたで、奇妙な記憶や夢や幻想によって駆り立てられる恐怖を解決することができません。おそらく彼女は、不思議の国でならうまくやっていけるでしょう。彼女はいままでもそうしてきました。彼女は「現実」世界が提供できないもの：安寧、知識、そして過去の真実を求めて、その世界を旅します。しかし彼女の不在で、不思議の国も苦しんでいます。何かが恐ろしく間違い、いま強大な悪がかつて彼女の美しい隠れ家だった場所を襲っています。アリスは不思議の国と……そして彼女自身を……ともに食らい尽くそうとする狂気から救い出せるでしょうか? 主な特徴:  特徴的な三人称視点アクション: 
   爆発するティーポットキャノン、お仕置き木馬、そして伝統的なボーパルブレードなどの、アップグレード可能な複数の近接武器を使ってください。   暗く、崩壊した不思議の国の探索: 
   チェシャ猫、狂った帽子屋、イモムシ、そして赤の女王などの、よく知っている奇妙な登場人物たちとの遭遇。   魔法の能力: 
   不思議の国では、アリスのドレスによって、浮かんだり、縮んだり、敵を粉砕するために塔のように大きくなったりといった特殊な能力を得られます。   相互的なパズル: 
   障害物の変形や音楽の記憶、チェス、絵のブロックなどの、直感的で解き甲斐のあるパズル。

Eleven years ago a horrific fire took Alice’s family from her and left her mind horrifically scarred. Afterwards she was confined to Rutledge Asylum, where she struggled to confront her demons by slipping further into her fantasy world of Wonderland. Now, after ten years, she has finally secured her release—yet she still bears the heavy psychological burden of that tragic event.
 
 With her mind in tatters, she is unable to resolve the fear prompted by her strange memories, dreams, and visions. Perhaps she’ll do better in Wonderland. She always has. She travels there, seeking what the “real” world can’t provide: security, knowledge, and the truth about the past. But in her absence, Wonderland too has suffered. Something has gone horribly wrong, and now a great evil is descending upon what once was her beautiful refuge. Can Alice save Wonderland—and herself—from the madness that consumes them both?
 					 Key Features: 					 Intense 3rd person action: 
 					  Use multiple upgradeable melee weapons, including the explosive Teapot Cannon, the punishing Hobby Horse, and the classic Vorpal Blade.
 					   Explore a dark and shattered Wonderland: 
 					  Encounter familiar but now strange characters, including the Cheshire Cat, the Mad Hatter, the Caterpillar and the Red Queen.
 					   Magical abilities: 
 					  Obtain peculiar abilities in Wonderland such as floating with Alice’s dress, shrinking, or growing to towering sizes in order to crush enemies.
 					   Interactive puzzles: 
 					  Intuitive and rewarding puzzles such as transforming obstacles, musical memories, chess, and picture blocks.
2011 video game, sequel to American McGee's Alice

Return to Wonderland and experience an all new nightmare as Alice fights to regain her sanity as she fights for the truth behind her past. Can Alice save Wonderland - and herself - from the madness that consumes them both?

Within events of the first game, Alice Liddell, believing herself responsible for a fire that consumed her home and her family, escapes into a twisted version of Wonderland. While held at Rutledge Asylum for treatment, Alice was able to conquer her doubts, and eventually was released from the ward. Madness Returns takes place in 1875, a year after Alice's release. Alice, now 19 years old,[6] resides at an orphanage in Victorian London, under the care of Dr. Angus Bumby, a psychiatrist who uses hypnosis to help his child patients forget their memories. Though she believes that she is fine, Alice still suffers from hallucinations of Wonderland.

During an errand, Alice is struck by a hallucination and believes herself to be in Wonderland again. Though initially idyllic, the peaceful land quickly becomes corrupted by the Infernal Train that rampages through it, leaving behind the Ruin, a force that attempts to stop Alice. Alice meets with the Cheshire Cat who affirms that it is some outside force, not Alice, that has caused this corruption, and urges her to seek out former friends and foes to discover the source of the Train. Throughout the rest of the game, Alice briefly returns to reality between episodes occurring within Wonderland. In the real world, Alice learns from the family lawyer that her sister, Elizabeth (nicknamed "Lizzie"), was first to die in the fire, despite being the farthest from its source, and had been locked in her room.

Within the corrupted Wonderland, Alice attempts to learn more from Wonderland's various citizens, including the Duchess, the Mad Hatter, the Mock Turtle, the Walrus and the Carpenter, and the Caterpillar. She is ultimately told that the Queen of Hearts still lives despite her defeat at Alice's hands before, though in a diminished capacity. At the Queen's castle, Alice discovers the Queen's true form, which resembles her younger self. The Queen reveals that an entity called the Dollmaker has taken over the Infernal Train and is corrupting Wonderland.

Returning to London, Alice starts to recall her memories of the night of the fire and realizes that Dr. Bumby was there. He is responsible for the death of her sister and her whole family. She comes to the conclusion that Dr. Bumby is attempting to erase the memories of the fire from her mind and, as he has done with other children, trying to leave her as a "blank toy" to be taken by abusive masters and child molesters for a price. Furious, Alice confronts both Dr. Bumby in the real world at the Moorgate station and Dr. Bumby's Wonderland counterpart, the Dollmaker, in her fantasy on the Infernal Train. Dr. Bumby admits to his crimes, and even attests to setting Alice's home on fire after Lizzie refused his advances, removing any witnesses to his having raped her that night. He points out that by wiping out her Wonderland, he will make her forget the events of that night, while he will continue as a member of high society. Alice defeats the Dollmaker in Wonderland, giving her the strength in the real world and in her mind to push Dr. Bumby into the path of an oncoming train, killing him.

As Alice leaves the station, she finds herself in a hybrid vision of London mixed with Wonderland, Londerland. Alice wanders into the unknown terrain as the Cheshire Cat monologues that Alice has found the truth that was "worth the pain fighting for", and Wonderland, though damaged, is safe for the time being.

Afterwards she was confined to Rutledge Asylum, where she struggled to confront her demons by slipping further into her fantasy world of Wonderland. Now, after ten years, she has finally secured her release—yet she still bears the heavy psychological burden of that tragic event.
 
 With her mind in tatters, she is unable to resolve the fear prompted by her strange memories, dreams, and visions. Perhaps she’ll do better in Wonderland. She always has. She travels there, seeking what the “real” world can’t provide: security, knowledge, and the truth about the past. But in her absence, Wonderland too has suffered. Something has gone horribly wrong, and now a great evil is descending upon what once was her beautiful refuge. Can Alice save Wonderland—and herself—from the madness that consumes them both?

 					  Use multiple upgradeable melee weapons, including the explosive Teapot Cannon, the punishing Hobby Horse, and the classic Vorpal Blade.
 					   Explore a dark and shattered Wonderland: 
 					  Encounter familiar but now strange characters, including the Cheshire Cat, the Mad Hatter, the Caterpillar and the Red Queen.
 					   Magical abilities: 
 					  Obtain peculiar abilities in Wonderland such as floating with Alice’s dress, shrinking, or growing to towering sizes in order to crush enemies.
 					   Interactive puzzles: 
 					  Intuitive and rewarding puzzles such as transforming obstacles, musical memories, chess, and picture blocks.

Undici anni fa un terribile incendio strappò via ad Alice la sua famiglia lasciando la sua mente terribilmente segnata.
 Con la mente in frantumi, si ritrova incapace di risolvere la paura evocata dalle sue strane memorie, sogni e visioni. Forse le andrà meglio nel Paese delle Meraviglie. E' sempre stato così. Si reca lì, in cerca di ciò che il mondo "reale" non può darle: sicurezza, conoscenza, e la verità sul passato. Ma in sua assenza, anche il Paese delle Meraviglie ha sofferto. Qualcosa è andato terribilmente storto, e ora un grande male sta per calare su quel che una volta era il suo incantevole rifugio. Riuscirà Alice a salvare il Paese delle Meraviglie - e sè stessa - dalla pazzia che li consuma entrambi? Caratteristiche Principali:  Intensa azione in terza persona: 
   Usa e potenzia una moltitudine di armi, inclusi il Cannone Teiera, il terribile Cavallo Giocattolo e la classica Spada Vorpal.   Esplora un Paese delle Meraviglie dalle tinte dark ed in rovina: 
    Incontra personaggi familiari ma ora estranei, come il Gatto del Cheshire, il Cappellaio Matto, il Bruco, e la Regina di Cuori.   Abilità magiche: 
   Ottieni particolari abilità nel Paese delle Meraviglie come planare col vestito di Alice, rimpicciolirsi, o crescere fino a dimensioni colossali per schiacciare i nemici.   Puzzle interattivi: 
   Puzzle intuitivi e gratificanti quali trasformare ostacoli, giochi di memoria musicale, scacchi e picture blocks.

title: Dark Souls: Remastered
description: Dark Souls Remastered is a remastered version of the original game Dark Souls. The updated version of the game features graphical enhancements, an expanded online mode, and the Artorias of the Abyss DLC.

title: Hob
description: 2017 video game

localized_description.text:
据悉，《Hob》的世界设定在一个美丽而危险的未知星球，在这里，鲜活的生灵安居于土地之上，无数嘈杂的机械体则活跃于地下，随着玩家们探索的愈发深入，你会愈发感受到这个世界的危险……从视频中也看出，《Hob》的世界生机勃勃但暗藏杀机，你需要对抗不断侵袭的黑暗势力。
目前本作发售日未定，将登陆PC与主机平台（具体登陆哪些主机尚未公布），Runic Games将于本月28开启的PAX游戏展上公布详细信息，敬请期待。
2017 video game
videojuego de 2017
jeu vidéo de 2017
Computerspiel aus dem Jahr 2017
vídeojogo de 2017

Hob is set on a beautiful and dangerous unknown world, with buzzing life above and the whirrs of mysterious machinery below. The more players delve into the world’s design, the more they uncover a planet in peril. Players must learn to survive, understand their true purpose through acquiring skills, and ultimately transform the nature of the world itself.

Hob is presented without text or dialogue. Narrative is revealed as players explore and interact with their mysterious planet, and the strange life forms that inhabit it. Hob features smooth controller gameplay, multi-layered puzzles, and striking visuals.

From the team that brought you Torchlight and Torchlight II comes Hob: a vibrant, suspenseful action-adventure game set on a stunning and brutal world in disarray. As players delve into the mysteries around them, they discover a planet in peril. Can it be mended, or will the world fall further into chaos?
 
        Features 
 WORDLESS NARRATIVE: Presented without text or dialogue, Hob’s story is revealed as you explore the planet and interact with the strange lifeforms that inhabit it.
 
 TRANSFORM THE WORLD by solving puzzles and repairing the planet. The landscape will change before your eyes, opening new areas to uncover and explore.
 
 GRAPPLE, PUNCH, and WARP through the world! Use your mechanical glove-arm abilities for traversal as well as combat.
 
 ADVENTURE in an open world, explore ruins, befriend sprites, and battle the rogue creatures that threaten their extinction.

De los creadores de Torchlight y Torchlight II llega Hob: un vibrante juego de acción, aventuras y suspense que se desarrolla en un mundo sobrecogedor y brutal donde reina el caos. Al ir indagando en los misterios que lo rodean, los jugadores descubrirán un planeta en peligro. ¿Se podrá arreglar o el mundo se sumergirá aún más en el caos? 
  
        
  Características  
  NARRATIVA SIN PALABRAS: Sin texto ni diálogos, la historia de Hob se desvela conforme exploras el planeta e interactúas con las extrañas formas de vida que lo habitan.
  
  TRANSFORMA EL MUNDO resolviendo puzles y reparando el planeta. El paisaje se transformará ante tus ojos, abriendo nuevas zonas que descubrir y explorar.
  
  ¡AGARRA, GOLPEA y TELETRANSPÓRTATE por el mundo! Usa las habilidades del brazo-guante mecanizado para desplazarte y combatir.
  
  AVENTÚRATE en un mundo abierto, explora ruinas, hazte amigo de los duendes y combate contra las criaturas salvajes que quieren extinguirlos.

Développé par les créateurs de Torchlight et Torchlight II, découvrez Hob : un jeu d'action/aventure palpitant et intrigant dans un monde en ruines aussi beau que cruel. Percez les mystères qui vous entourent et explorez ce monde en péril. Pourra-t-il être sauvé, ou sombrera-t-il plus loin dans le chaos ? 
  
        
  Caractéristiques  
  NARRATION SANS DIALOGUE : dénuée de texte, l'histoire de Hob se déroule au fil de vos explorations et de vos interactions avec d'étranges créatures.
  
  TRANSFORMEZ LE MONDE en résolvant des énigmes et en réparant la planète. Le paysage change sous vos yeux et vous ouvre de nouvelles zones.
  
  GRAPPIN, COUP DE POING et WARP seront vos meilleures armes ! Utilisez les capacités de votre bras mécanique pour vous déplacer et vous battre.
  
  VIVEZ L'AVENTURE dans un monde ouvert, explorez ses ruines, rencontrez ses esprits et combattez les créatures malfaisantes qui menacent leur existence.

Von dem Team hinter Torchlight and Torchlight II kommt Hob: Ein lebhaftes, spannendes Action-Adventure in einer atemberaubenden und brutalen Welt im Chaos. Während die Spieler die unmittelbaren Geheimnisse um sie herum erforschen finden sie einen Planeten in Gefahr auf. Kann er geheilt warden? Oder wird die Welt tiefer ins Chaos stürzen. 
  
        
  Features  
  Wortlose Erzählstruktur: Hob’s Geschichte wird ohne Text oder Dialog, einzig durch Erforschung und Interaktion mit der Welt und ihrer bizarren Fauna offenbart.
  
  Transformiere die Welt indem du Puzzles löst und die Welt reparierst. Die Landschaft wird sich vor deinen Augen verändern und somit neue erkundbare Gebiete offenbaren.
  
  Klettere, kämpfe und teleportiere dich durch die Welt! Benutze deinen mechanischen Arm sowohl zur Erforschung als auch im Kampf.
  
  Erlebe Abenteuer in einer offenen Welt, erforsche Ruinen, befreunde heimische Geister und bekaempfe außerirdische Feinde die nach deren Ausloeschung streben.

Da equipe de Torchlight  e Torchlight II, chega Hob: um jogo de ação e aventura vibrante, cheio de suspense, que se passa em um mundo lindo, brutal e em pura desordem. Conforme os jogadores se aprofundam nos mistérios que os cercam, eles descobrem um planeta em perigo. Será possível recuperá-lo ou será que o mundo seguirá rumo ao caos completo? 
  
        
  Recursos  
  NARRATIVA SEM PALAVRAS: A história de Hob é revelada sem textos nem diálogos, conforme você explora o planeta e interage com as formas de vida estranhas que o habitam.
  
  TRANSFORME O MUNDO resolvendo quebra-cabeças e recuperando o planeta. O cenário mudará diante dos seus olhos e abrirá novas áreas para descobrir e explorar.
  
  AGARRE, SOQUE e TELEPORTE-SE pelo mundo! Use as habilidades da sua luva mecânica para atravessar terrenos e entrar em combates.
  
  AVENTURE-SE pelo mundo, explore ruínas, faça amizade com fadas, enfrente as criaturas monstruosas que ameaçam extingui-las.

Fra holdet, der gav dig Torchlight og Torchlight II, kommer nu Hob: et levende og spændingsfyldt actioneventyr, der udspiller sig i en overvældende og brutal verden i opløsning. Efterhånden som du dykker ned i mysterierne omkring dig, opdager du en planet i fare. Kan den reddes, eller vil verden forfalde i endnu mere kaos? 
  
        
  Features  
  ORDLØS FORTÆLLING: Historien om Hob fortælles uden tekst og dialog, men bliver afdækket, efterhånden som du udforsker og interagerer med de sære livsformer, der bor på planeten.
  
  TRANSFORMÉR VERDEN ved at løse opgaver og reparere planeten. Landskabet ændrer sig for øjnene af dig og giver adgang til nye områder at udforske.
  
  Brug gribekrog, slå og bliv varpet gennem verden! Udnyt din mekaniske arms evner i kamp og til at komme rundt.
  
  TAG PÅ EVENTYR i en åben verden. Udforsk ruiner, bliv venner med alfer, og kæmp mod de onde væsner, der truer dem.

Dagli autori di Torchlight e Torchlight II arriva Hob: un gioco di azione-avventura vivo e pieno di suspense ambientato in un magnifico e terribile mondo in rovina. Esplorando i misteri intorno a loro, i giocatori scopriranno un pianeta in pericolo. Riusciranno a guarirlo o sprofonderà ancora di più nel caos? 
  
        
  Caratteristiche  
  NARRATIVA SENZA PAROLE - La storia di Hob, presentata senza testi né dialoghi, viene svelata esplorando il pianeta e interagendo con le sue forme di vita.
  
  TRASFORMA IL MONDO risolvendo rompicapi e riparando il pianeta. Il paesaggio cambierà davanti a te, aprendo nuove aree da scoprire ed esplorare.
  
  Esplora il mondo con RAMPINO, PUGNI e TELETRASPORTO! Usa le abilità del tuo braccio-guanto meccanico per il movimento e il combattimento.
  
  AVVENTURATI in un mondo aperto, esplora rovine, fai amicizia con gli spiritelli e affronta le creature ribelli che minacciano di portarli all'estinzione.
computerspil fra 2017
videogioco del 2017

brief: 2017 video game

title: Higurashi When They Cry
description: 昭和58年夏。远离都市的深山荒村，雏见泽。前原圭一，最近刚刚搬到这个总人口不足2000的小村里。开朗善言的性格让他很快融入了新的班级里。其中关系最好的要数爱照顾人的礼奈，有领导气的魅音，耍阴谋的高手沙都子，身为古手神社的女儿、身世神秘的梨花…原以为，无忧无虑的日子会这么持续下去的。每年6月举行的祭典，“绵流祭”。那本应只是愉快的一天。直到，他知道了围绕这个雏见泽的一个迷为止…在祭典之日，不断重复的惨剧。从几年前开始的连续离奇死亡事件，每年的这天，都会有一个人死去，一个人下落不明。事件的真相是什么？凶手是谁？在好奇心的驱使下，圭一踏入了这个村子里的黑暗中。从那天开始，圭一的周遭开始一点一点却又确实的改变了。没错，因为…在雏见泽里，唯有夜蝉的鸣声依旧，仿佛，宣告着这个早来的夏日。梨花作为第五年的受害者，每次死后可以借助一直跟在身边的“神”羽入的力量回到死前的某个时间点（具体细节请参阅“澪尽し编”），但是，每次努力到最后都以自己的死收尾，一百年来都没有改变。

title: Dungeons of Hinterberg
description: From developer Microbird, Dungeons of Hinterberg takes place in the Austrian Alps, where the small town of Hinterberg has become a tourist destination due to its lush scenery and crisp mountain air. And also monsters. It's a great place to holiday if you want to kill some monsters.

localized_description.text: From developer Microbird, Dungeons of Hinterberg takes place in the Austrian Alps, where the small town of Hinterberg has become a tourist destination due to its lush scenery and crisp mountain air. And also monsters. It's a great place to holiday if you want to kill some monsters.

From developer Microbird, Dungeons of Hinterberg takes place in the Austrian Alps, where the small town of Hinterberg has become a tourist destination due to its lush scenery and crisp mountain air. And also monsters. It's a great place to holiday if you want to kill some monsters.

Welcome to Hinterberg, a new tourist hotspot in the idyllic Austrian Alps! You play as Luisa, a burnt-out law trainee taking a break from her fast-paced corporate life to conquer the Dungeons of Hinterberg. There are plenty of dungeons to find and adventures to be had in Hinterberg – will Luisa be sent packing on her first day, or remain to become a Master Slayer? Only one way to find out…
2024 video game developed by Microbird Games
videojuego de 2024
jeu vidéo de 2024
Computerspiel aus dem Jahr 2024
jogo eletrônico de 2024
computerspil fra 2024
videogioco del 2024

Join our Discord     
 
  About the Game Welcome to Hinterberg, a new tourist hotspot in the idyllic Austrian Alps! You play as Luisa, a burnt-out law trainee taking a break from her fast-paced corporate life to conquer the Dungeons of Hinterberg. There are plenty of dungeons to find and adventures to be had in Hinterberg – will Luisa be sent packing on her first day, or remain to become a Master Slayer? Only one way to find out… 
 
  
 
 Snowboard down a glacier, zipline through the forest, climb a mountain, or have a coffee by the lake... There’s no shortage of places to discover while you’re out looking for your next dungeon!
 
  
 
  
 
 Monsters lurk around every corner in Hinterberg, and your sword and magic skills are essential for keeping them at bay. Harness the wind, conjure a snowboard out of thin air, or freeze your enemies in a jelly block!
 
  
 
  
 
 Braving a dungeon requires more than just cutting-edge sports gear and a good sword arm: Hinterberg’s dungeons are full of puzzles that will surprise and challenge you. Use your head, your magic skills, and every trick in the book to solve them!
 
  
 
  
 
 Spend your nights forging friendships with the locals and other adventurers! Some of them will help you get stronger or teach you new tricks, others are just here for excitement and selfies... But good relationships don't just make your stay more memorable - they're the key to becoming a better slayer!

Join our Discord     
 
  Acerca del juego Te damos la bienvenida a Hinterberg, un nuevo destino turístico en los idílicos Alpes Austriacos. Te pondrás en la piel de Luisa, una abogada en prácticas que, cansada del frenesí corporativo en el que está sumida, decide tomarse unas vacaciones para adentrarse en las Mazmorras de Hinterberg, un lugar de interminables calabozos e incontables aventuras. ¿Volverá Luisa con el rabo entre las piernas el primer día o persistirá hasta convertirse en una ducha asesina? Solo hay una manera de averiguarlo... 
 
  
  ¡Explora los Alpes! 
 Deslízate por un glaciar en snowboard, recorre bosques en tirolina, escala montañas, tómate un café a orillas de un lago... ¡No vas a echar de menos lugares que descubrir mientras buscas la siguiente mazmorra!
 
  
 
  
  ¡Lucha con clase! 
 En todos los rincones de Hinterberg acechan monstruos. A golpe de espada y hechizo, lograrás mantenerlos a raya. ¡Domina los vientos, materializa una tabla de snowboard o convierte a tus enemigos en gelatina!
 
  
 
  
  ¡Devánate los sesos para encontrar la salida! 
 Para superar una mazmorra no solo necesitarás lo último en equipo deportivo y destreza con la espada. Las mazmorras de Hinterberg están plagadas de enigmas y rompecabezas que te sorprenderán y pondrán a prueba. ¡Saca a relucir tu astucia, tus aptitudes mágicas y todos los trucos que se te ocurran para seguir avanzando!
 
  
 
  
  ¡Conoce a los lugareños! 
 ¡Pasa las noches forjando amistades con la gente del lugar y otros aventureros! Algunos te ayudarán a fortalecerte o te enseñarán trucos nuevos. Otros no buscan más que emociones y algún que otro selfi... En Hinterberg, las amistades no solo hacen tu estancia más memorable; ¡también mejoran tus aptitudes de caza!

Join our Discord     
 
  À propos du jeu Bienvenue à Hinterberg, le nouveau coin préféré des touristes dans les idylliques Alpes orientales ! Vous incarnez Luisa, une apprentie en droit désabusée qui cherche à s'évader du rythme infernal de sa vie professionnelle pour partir à la conquête des donjons d'Hinterberg. Les donjons et les aventures ne manquent pas à Hinterberg. Luisa repartira-t-elle chez elle la queue entre les jambes dès le premier jour, ou entrera-t-elle dans la légende ? Une seule façon de le savoir... 
 
  
  Explorez les Alpes ! 
 Dévalez un glacier en snowboard, traversez la forêt en tyrolienne, escaladez une montagne ou prenez un café au bord d'un lac... En cherchant votre prochain donjon, découvrez de nombreux endroits pittoresques !
 
  
 
  
  Chasse rime avec classe ! 
 À Hinterberg, les monstres se cachent dans tous les coins de rue. Votre maîtrise de l'épée et de la magie seront essentielles pour les tenir à distance. Commandez au vent, faites apparaître un snowboard de nulle part ou emprisonnez vos ennemis dans un bloc de gelée !
 
  
 
  
  Trouvez la sortie ! 
 Pour braver ces donjons, ne vous reposez pas sur votre épée ni sur votre tenue de sport dernier cri : Hinterberg regorge d'énigmes surprenantes qui mettront vos capacités de réflexion à l'épreuve. Utilisez votre cerveau, votre magie ainsi que toutes les astuces possibles et imaginables afin de les résoudre !
 
  
 
  
  Rencontrez les habitants ! 
 La nuit, liez-vous d'amitié avec les habitants et les autres aventuriers ! Certains d'entre eux vous aideront à vous améliorer et vous enseigneront de nouvelles compétences, d'autres ne sont là que pour s'amuser et prendre des selfies... Mais les bonnes relations ne sont pas seulement source de bons souvenirs : elles sont essentielles pour progresser !

Join our Discord     
 
  Infos zum Spiel Willkommen in Hinterberg, einem neuen Touristen-Hotspot in den idyllischen Ostalpen Österreichs! Du schlüpfst in die Rolle von Luisa, einer Rechtsgehilfin in Ausbildung, die nach einem Burnout eine Pause von ihrem stressigen Firmenleben nutzt, um die Dungeons von Hinterberg zu erobern. In der Bergidylle gibt es reichlich Dungeons zu entdecken und Abenteuer zu erleben. Wird Luisa an ihrem ersten Tag klein beigeben müssen oder bleiben, um zur Meisterjägerin zu werden? Es gibt nur einen Weg, das rauszufinden … 
 
  
  Erkunde die Alpen! 
 Gehe auf einem Gletscher Snowboarden, rausche mit der Seilrutsche durch den Wald, erklimme einen Berggipfel oder genieße eine Tasse Kaffee am See … Auf der Suche nach dem nächsten Dungeon gibt es eine Menge zu entdecken!
 
  
 
  
  Stilvolles Geschnetzel 
 In Hinterberg lauern hinter jeder Ecke Monster. Nutze Schwert und Zauberkräfte, um sie in Schach zu halten. Nutze Windböen, beschwöre ein Snowboard aus dem Nichts oder friere deine Gegner in Geleeblöcken ein!
 
  
 
  
  Löse den Weg frei! 
 Um die Dungeons heil zu überstehen, brauchst du mehr als nur gute Kletterausrüstung und einen starken Schwertarm: Hinterbergs Dungeons stecken voller unerwarteter und fordernder Rätsel. Löse sie mit Hirnschmalz, Zauberkräften und allen erdenklichen Tricks!
 
  
 
  
  Misch dich unters Volk! 
 Abends kannst du dich mit den Dorfbewohnern und anderen Abenteurer:innen anfreunden! Manche von ihnen werden dir helfen, stärker zu werden, oder dir neue Tricks beibringen. Andere sind nur für den Nervenkitzel und ein paar Selfies angereist … aber gute Kontakte machen nicht nur deinen Aufenthalt in Hinterberg unvergesslich, sie lassen dich auch zu einer besseren Jägerin werden!

Join our Discord

title: Persona 5 The Royal
description: Don the mask and join the Phantom Thieves of Hearts as they stage grand heists, infiltrate the minds of the corrupt, and make them change their ways!

localized_title.text: 女神异闻录5 皇家版
ペルソナ5 ザ・ロイヤル
女神异闻录5 皇家版 ペルソナ5 ザ・ロイヤル

localized_description.text: Vista a máscara, junte-se aos Phantom Thieves of Hearts, arme grandes assaltos, infiltre-se nas mentes dos corruptos e faça eles mudarem de atitude!
Don the mask and join the Phantom Thieves of Hearts as they stage grand heists, infiltrate the minds of the corrupt, and make them change their ways!
Enfilez le masque des Voleurs fantômes de cœurs, montez de gros coups, infiltrez l'esprit des corrompus et poussez-les à changer !
Indossa la maschera e unisciti ai Ladri Fantasma per organizzare colpi sensazionali, infiltrandoti nelle menti corrotte per spingerle a cambiare!
Ponte la máscara, acompaña a los Ladrones Fantasma de Corazones en sus asaltos ¡e infíltrate en la mente de los corruptos para hacerles cambiar de opinión!

以此意志去争夺吧。女神异闻录5，新生（皇家版）。

全球累计销量突破270万份，斩获了多个奖项的侠盗·青春RPG「女神异闻录5」，在追加大量新要素后闪亮登场。随着新角色稍微登场以及“充满未知的第3学期”的加入，「女神异闻录5」中尚未提及的“深层”即将揭晓……！

全新追加的地点·事件将进一步充实学生生活。放学后的怪盗生活中，也会加入新的敌人、机关以及神秘宝藏等，等待攻克的殿堂中也有异变发生……！？敬请期待偷心怪盗团全新的活跃！
An enhanced version of Persona 5 with some new characters and a third semester added to the game. Released Internationally in 2020.

brief: Don the mask and join the Phantom Thieves of Hearts as they stage grand heists, infiltrate the minds of the corrupt, and make them change their ways!

title: Deadlock
description:
EARLY DEVELOPMENT BUILD 
 Deadlock is still in early development stages with lots of temporary art and experimental gameplay.
 
  LIMITED ACCESS 
 Access to Deadlock is currently limited to friend invites via our playtesters.

localized_description.text:
EARLY DEVELOPMENT BUILD 
 Deadlock is still in early development stages with lots of temporary art and experimental gameplay.
 
  LIMITED ACCESS 
 Access to Deadlock is currently limited to friend invites via our playtesters.

开发初期版本 
 《异锁》仍然处于开发初期，有很多临时艺术作品、实验性游戏玩法以及尚在进行中的本地化工作。
 
  有限访问 
 目前仅限游戏测试人员邀请的好友可以访问。

EARLY DEVELOPMENT BUILD 
 Deadlock is still in early development stages with lots of temporary art and experimental gameplay.
 
  LIMITED ACCESS 
 Access to Deadlock is currently limited to friend invites via our playtesters.

VERSIÓN TEMPRANA DE DESARROLLO 
 Deadlock continúa en fases tempranas de desarrollo, por lo que muchos recursos artísticos son temporales, buena parte de la jugabilidad es experimental y la localización es un trabajo en curso.
 
  ACCESO LIMITADO 
 Por el momento, el acceso a Deadlock está limitado a quienes han recibido una invitación a participar en las pruebas de juego.

VERSION INITIALE DE DÉVELOPPEMENT 
 Deadlock est encore en phase de développement initiale. Beaucoup d'éléments visuels sont encore temporaires, les mécaniques de jeu sont expérimentales et la traduction est amenée à changer.
 
  ACCÈS LIMITÉ 
 Pour le moment, le seul moyen d'essayer le jeu est d'obtenir une invitation d'un contact qui y a déjà accès.

BUILD IM FRÜHEN ENTWICKLUNGSSTADIUM 
 Deadlock befindet sich im frühen Entwicklungsstadium und beinhaltet viele temporäre Grafiken, experimentelles Gameplay und eine noch in Arbeit befindliche Lokalisierung.
 
  EINGESCHRÄNKTER ZUGRIFF 
 Der Zugriff auf Deadlock ist aktuell auf Einladungen durch Freunde beschränkt, die ausschließlich von unseren Spieltestern versendet werden.

EARLY DEVELOPMENT BUILD 
 Deadlock is still in early development stages with lots of temporary art and experimental gameplay.
 
  LIMITED ACCESS 
 Access to Deadlock is currently limited to friend invites via our playtesters.

早期開発版ビルド 
 『Deadlock』は開発初期段階にあるため、仮のアートや実験的なゲームプレイ、未確定のローカライズが多く含まれています。
 
  アクセス制限 
 『Deadlock』のアクセスは現在、プレイテスターによるフレンド招待に限定されています。

title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
description:
S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  About the Game The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

localized_description.text:
S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
   
 准备好冒险闯入封锁区，伺机从中大捞一笔，乃至挖掘出掩藏在切尔诺贝利核心地带的真相。   
  * 在栩栩如生的开放世界中谱写史诗级非线性故事
 * 类型多样的敌人和上百种武器组合 
 * 行为模式各异的传奇变种生物 
 * 价值惊人的神器和无情的异常事件 
  探索传奇的《潜行者》世界，同时体验!
 
 
  关于游戏 封锁区，原先是切尔诺贝利核电站附近的禁区。此地危机四伏、难以预测。封锁区本就是世上最危险的地方，而2006年发生的一起诡谲事故，更让这里疑云密布。异常现象层出不穷、神器琳琅满目，饥肠辘辘的变种生物伺机而动，贪得无厌的暴徒四处横行，而潜行者们也来到这里，探求新生和财路……值得一提的是，你可以在《潜行者：切尔诺贝利的阴影》扮演上述角色！ 探索 
 为了生存，真正的潜行者绝不会停止探索。珍贵的战利品、装备和补给、新朋友、捷径或有关这片土地恐怖谜团的答案，都能带来一线生机。准备好前往封锁区中心放手一搏吧，这里封锁严密，不速之客难以涉足。 险境 
 要达成目标，潜行者必将踏过坎坷荆棘。无论是暗藏杀机的异常现象（那是能让久经沙场的战士粉身碎骨的恐怖力量），抑或是饥肠辘辘的变种生物，还是反水背叛，这些都能让你身陷绝境。拿出真本事，保持必胜的决心，与无数敌对势力和变种生物相抗衡。即使单独行动，也得时刻保持警惕，毕竟在这片封锁区内，一片叶、一株草都可能暗藏杀机。 废土 
 萧瑟凄凉的阴郁氛围笼罩着这片废土，成百上千的流浪者居住于此。不过，潜行者总是形单影只，往往面临着潜藏的危险。仔细倾听，步步为营，除了自己和盖革计数器，对所有人保持怀疑。只有准确的直觉、精湛的技能和冷酷的胆识才能让独行的潜行者在封锁区内找到方向
 
  游戏特色： 
 
   采用黑暗东欧地区的科幻背景设定，集动作、潜行、恐怖、生存和RPG元素为一体。
   在这片危险地域中，时间永远停滞，为你营造独一无二的孤寂氛围。
   游戏地点取材于真实的切尔诺贝利禁区：普里皮亚季、切尔诺贝利核电站等。
   敌对势力和NPC均由智能AI接管，有着各自的生活模式，能够对变化作出反应。
   非线性的故事体验，你的选择可以触发多种结局。
   动态昼夜循环和天气变化将会对游玩产生影响。
   多人模式最多支持32名玩家同图游玩。

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  關於此遊戲 The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepárate para entrar en la Zona bajo tu propia responsabilidad para intentar hacer una fortuna o descubrir la verdad que se oculta en el corazón de Chernóbil.                                                        
  
 * FASCINANTE HISTORIA NO LINEAL EN UN MUNDO ABIERTO FLUIDO 
 * NUMEROSOS ENEMIGOS Y CIENTOS DE COMBINACIONES DE ARMAS 
 * MUTANTES LEGENDARIOS CON COMPORTAMIENTOS DISTINTOS 
 * ARTEFACTOS VALIOSÍSIMOS Y ANOMALÍAS INMISERICORDES 
  Descubre el legendario universo de S.T.A.L.K.E.R. y su experiencia!
 
 
  Acerca del juego La Zona, un lugar lleno de insondables maravillas y siniestras amenazas, es el antiguo territorio de exclusión cercano a la Planta de energía nuclear de Chernóbil. El sector más peligroso de la Tierra se cubrió aún más de misterio tras un extraño accidente en 2006. Está repleto de anomalías con valiosos artefactos, voraces mutantes y mezquinos matones, además de stalkers que buscan una nueva vida y formas de enriquecerse… ¡Ese podrías ser tú en S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! BÚSQUEDA 
 Para sobrevivir, un stalker que se las precie nunca puede dejar de buscar. Son cosas como los valiosos trofeos, el equipamiento y los suministros, los nuevos amigos, los atajos o las respuestas a los enigmas más macabros de estas tierras las que te ofrecen una oportunidad de eludir la muerte, así que prepárate para una incursión en busca de tu destino en el centro de la Zona, el lugar más protegido contra visitantes indeseados. PELIGROS 
 El viaje de un stalker hasta su meta nunca es fácil. Una anomalía traicionera capaz de acabar incluso con los luchadores más veteranos, un voraz mutante extraviado, una traición incomprensible... hay muchas cosas que pueden costarte la vida. Prepárate para poner a prueba tu destreza y tu coraje para resistir a rivales y mutantes superiores a ti en número. Estate alerta incluso cuando estés a solas, pues, en la Zona, casi nada es lo que parece a primera vista. DESOLACIÓN 
 Estas tierras inhóspitas atrapadas en un eterno otoño están llenas de cientos de vagabundos. Sin embargo, un stalker siempre va por su cuenta y se enfrenta a peligros a menudo ocultos. Escucha con atención, calcula bien cada paso que das y no confíes en nadie salvo en ti y en tu contador Geiger. Solo la intuición combinada con maestría, valentía y mente fría pueden salvar a un stalker libre de perderse en la Zona.
 
  Características del juego: 
 
   Una mezcla de elementos de acción, sigilo, horror, supervivencia y rol en un oscuro marco de ciencia ficción en Europa del Este. 
   La particular atmósfera de soledad en un lugar peligroso donde se ha parado el tiempo para siempre.
   Ubicaciones trasladadas al juego desde la zona de exclusión de Chernóbil real: Prypiat, la central nuclear y muchas más.
   Inteligencia artificial de rivales y PNJ que viven sus propias vidas y son capaces de reaccionar a los cambios.
   Una historia no lineal en la que tus decisiones te llevan a uno de varios finales.
   Cambios dinámicos en el ciclo de día y noche, y condiciones meteorológicas que afectan a la forma de jugar. 
   Modos multijugador con hasta 32 jugadores en un mapa.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Préparez-vous à entrer dans la Zone à vos risques et périls pour faire fortune et qui sait peut-être trouver la vérité qui se cache dans le cœur de Chernobyl.
  * UNE HISTOIRE ÉPIQUE ET NON LINÉAIRE DANS UN MONDE ENTIÈREMENT OUVERT
 * DES ENNEMIS VARIÉS ET DES CENTAINES DE COMBINAISONS D'ARMES 
 * DES MUTANTS LÉGENDAIRES AVEC DES MODÈLES COMPORTEMENTAUX UNIQUES 
 * DES ARTEFACTS INESTIMABLES ET DES ANOMALIES IMPITOYABLES 
  Découvrez l'univers légendaire de S.T.A.L.K.E.R. et vivez une expérience incroyable!
 
 
  À propos du jeu La Zone, un endroit rempli de phénomènes incroyables et de terribles menaces, ancienne zone d’exclusion près de la centrale nucléaire de Chernobyl. Le mystère entourant l’endroit le plus dangereux de la terre s’est encore épaissi après un étrange incident en 2006. Des anomalies contenant de précieux artefacts, des mutants affamés et des rapaces de la pire espèce grouillent sur ces terres où les Stalkers affluent à la recherche d’une nouvelle vie et de façons de s’enrichir. Incarnez l’un d’entre eux dans S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl ! RECHERCHE 
 Pour survivre, un vrai Stalker ne doit jamais cesser ses recherches. Les trophées de valeur, l’équipement et les provisions, les nouveaux amis, les raccourcis ou les réponses aux énigmes les plus mystérieuses de ces terres... tous ces éléments vous donneront une petite chance de survie. Alors, préparez-vous à partir à l’aventure à la recherche de votre destin au centre de la Zone, un lieu top secret à l’abri des regards indésirables. DANGERS 
 La voie d’un Stalker est toujours parsemée d’embûches. Des anomalies sournoises pouvant terrasser les combattants les plus aguerris, des mutants voraces en liberté semant le chaos, des traîtrises cinglantes... voilà qui risque de vous coûter la vie. Exploitez au mieux vos compétences et faites preuve de bon sens pour échapper à vos rivaux et résister aux mutants toujours plus nombreux. Restez sur vos gardes quand vous vous retrouvez seul. Ici, dans la Zone, rien ne ressemble à ce qu’il y paraît au premier abord. DÉSOLATION 
 Ces terres désolées aux allures d’automne éternel regorgent de centaines de vagabonds. Mais un Stalker est toujours livré à lui-même, forcé d’affronter des dangers souvent invisibles. Tendez toujours l’oreille, calculez chacun de vos pas et ne faites confiance qu’à vous-même et à votre compteur Geiger. Seule l’intuition associée au talent et au courage sans faille peut empêcher un Stalker de se perdre dans la Zone.
 
  Caractéristiques du jeu : 
 
   Un mélange d’action, d’horreur et de survie ponctué d’éléments de RPG au cœur d’un environnement de science-fiction lugubre de l’Europe de l’Est.
   Atmosphère unique de solitude dans un lieu dangereux où le temps s’est arrêté à jamais.
   Lieux réels tirés de la véritable zone d’exclusion de Tchernobyl transférés dans le jeu : Pripyat, la centrale nucléaire de Tchernobyl et bien d’autres encore.
   Des adversaires et des PNJ intelligents capables de mener leur propre vie et de réagir aux changements.
   Un scénario non linéaire dans lequel vos choix mèneront à de nombreuses fins différentes.
   Un cycle jour-nuit et des conditions météo aux changements dynamiques qui modifient l’expérience de jeu.
   Des modes multijoueur pouvant compter jusqu’à 32 joueurs sur une carte.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel Die Zone, ein Ort voller unergründlicher Wunder und finsterer Bedrohungen, ist das ehemalige Sperrgebiet nahe des Atomkraftwerks Tschernobyl. Der gefährlichste Ort der Welt wirft seit einem mysteriösen Unfall im Jahr 2006 noch mehr Fragen auf. Seither wimmelt es in dem Gebiet von Anomalien mit kostbaren Artefakten, hungrigen Mutanten, gierigen Banditen und Stalkern, die auf der Suche nach einem neuen Leben und dem großen Geld sind … Werde einer von ihnen in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! DIE UNAUFHÖRLICHE SUCHE 
 Um ihr Überleben zu sichern, müssen Stalker unaufhörlich suchen und sammeln: Wertvolle Trophäen, Ausrüstung und Vorräte, neue Freunde, Abkürzungen oder auch Antworten auf die düstersten Rätsel dieses Gebiets können dazu beitragen, ihre Überlebenschancen zu erhöhen. Stell dich auf der Suche nach deinem Schicksal also auf Beutezüge im Herzen der Zone ein – jenem Ort, der wie kein anderer vor ungebetenen Gästen geschützt wird. GEFAHREN AN JEDER ECKE 
 Der Weg eines Stalkers zu seinem Ziel ist niemals ein Spaziergang: Von heimtückischen Anomalien, die selbst erfahrenste Soldaten in die Knie zwingen, über Scharen raubgieriger Mutanten bis hin zu bitterem Verrat – all diese Faktoren können dich das Leben kosten. Verlasse dich auf deine Fähigkeiten und deinen Schneid, um gegen die Vielzahl an Rivalen und Mutanten zu bestehen. Bleib wachsam, selbst wenn du allein bist, denn hier in der Zone ist selten etwas so, wie es auf den ersten Blick scheint. TROSTLOSIGKEIT 
 Die trostlose, im ewigen Herbst gefangene Landschaft wird von Hunderten von Landstreichern heimgesucht. Dennoch sind Stalker stets auf sich allein gestellt und stoßen häufig auf ungeahnte Gefahren. Spitze deine Ohren, plane jeden Schritt voraus und vertraue niemandem außer dir selbst und dem Geigerzähler. Nur die eigene Intuition im Zusammenspiel mit ihren Fähigkeiten und ihrem unbändigen Mut können Stalker davor bewahren, sich in der Zone zu verlieren.
 
  Features: 
 
   Eine Kombination aus Action-, Stealth-, Horror-, Survival- und Rollenspielelementen in einer düsteren, osteuropäischen Sci-Fi-Welt.
   Eine einzigartige Atmosphäre der Einsamkeit an einem gefährlichen Ort, an dem die Zeit für immer stillsteht.
   Gebiete der realen Tschernobyl-Sperrzone, die ins Spiel übernommen wurden: Prypjat, das Atomkraftwerk Tschernobyl und viele mehr.
   Clevere KI für Gegner und NPCs, die eigenen Aktivitäten nachgehen und auf Veränderungen reagieren können.
   Eine nichtlineare Story, in der deine Entscheidungen zahlreiche verschiedene Enden herbeiführen können.
   Dynamische Änderungen des Tag-Nacht-Rhythmus und der Wetterbedingungen mit Auswirkungen auf das Gameplay.
   Mehrspielermodi mit bis zu 32 Spielern auf einer Karte.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
   
 富を築くか、あるいはチョルノブイリの心臓部に隠された真実を求めて、危険なゾーンに足を踏み入れましょう。   
  * シームレスなオープンワールドで繰り広げられる壮大な非線形のストーリー
 * 多種多様な敵、そして何百通りもの組み合わせが可能な武器 
 * 異なる行動モデルを持つ伝説的なミュータント 
 * 計り知れない価値があるアーティファクトと容赦ないアノーマリー 
  伝説的なS.T.A.L.K.E.Rの世界とゲーム体験を楽しもう。!
 
 
  ゲームについて 底知れぬ謎と不吉な脅威に満ちた場所、ゾーン。かつてチョルノブイリ原子力発電所の近くに存在した立ち入り禁止区域である。地球上で最も危険なこの場所は、2006年の得体の知れない事故の後、謎がさらに深まった。貴重なアーティファクトを持つアノマリー、飢えたミュータント、強欲な悪党たちが、新しい生活と一攫千金を狙うストーカーたちと共にこの地に押し寄せた。『S.T.A.L.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl』で未知との遭遇を楽しもう。 探索 
 真のストーカーとして生き残るためには探索を続けなければならない。貴重なトロフィー、装備、物資、新たな仲間、近道、そしてこの地の謎を解き明かすことが、生き残る可能性を高めるのである。邪魔者たちによる鉄壁の警護が敷かれたゾーン中心部で、自らの運命を切り開け。 危険 
 ストーカーの目的地までの道のりは、決して平坦なものではない。経験豊富な人間でさえも太刀打ちできない危険なアノマリー、貪欲なミュータント、裏切り、これらのどれもがプレイヤーの命を奪うことになりかねない。数で勝る強敵やミュータントに対抗できるのは自身の腕と度量のみ。一人でいるときも油断は禁物。ここゾーンでは、想定外の事態は当たり前なのだから…。 荒廃 
 この荒涼とした常秋の地は、数多の浮浪者で溢れている。しかし、ストーカーは常に一人で行動しており、しばしば目に見えない危険に直面する。すべてに注意深く耳を傾けつつ移動し、自分自身とガイガーカウンター以外には何も信用してはならない。ゾーンで生き残るためには、直感と熟練の技、そして冷静な判断力が必要となる。
 
  ゲームの特徴： 
 
   東欧を舞台に、アクション、ステルス、ホラー、サバイバル、ロールプレイングの要素を掛け合わせたダークなSF。
   時間が永遠に止まった危険な場所で孤立する独特の設定。
   プリピャチなどの実際のチョルノブイリ立入禁止区域が登場。
   変化に柔軟に対応可能な優れたAIが組み込まれた対戦相手とNPC。
   選択肢によってエンディングが分岐するストーリー。
   ゲームプレイに影響を与える昼夜のサイクルや天候のダイナミックな変化。
   1つのマップに最大32人が参加できるマルチプレイヤーモード。

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  About the Game The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Om spillet I 1986, indtraf verdenshistoriens største atomkatastrofe på atomkraftværket i Tjernobyl. De sovjetiske myndigheder etablerede en 30 km bred 'Udelukkelseszone' rundt om denne radioaktive ødemark, men i 2006 rystede endnu en eksplosion den hærgede reaktor, udslettede alle levende væsner og fik zonens grænser til at bevæge sig udad. Fra dette epicenter strømmede bølger af muterede skabninger, dødbringende stråling og en underlig, abnorm energi. Zonen blev afspærret af militæret, som var parat til at åbne ild mod enhver, som var tåbelig nok til at trodse rædslerne.
 					Vi er nu i 2012. Folk har vovet sig længere og længere ind i hjertet af Zonen, drevet af beretninger om besynderlige 'artefakter', som er gennemsyret af abnorm energi. Lejesoldater og skattejægere kæmper om at få fat på disse artefakter, som kan indbringe svimlende summer på det sorte marked. Andre forsøger at finde sandheden bag Zonen, mens atter andre blot nyder stedets ubeboelige lovløshed. Uanset, hvad der driver dem, er disse individer - klunsere, overtrædere, eventyrere, eneboere, dræbere, opdagelsesrejsende og røvere - blevet kendt som S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s.
 					Du vågner op i Zonen som en sådan S.T.A.L.K.E.R. og kæmper for at overleve i dette menneskeskabte helvede, mens du prøver at finde frem til sandheden om Tjernobyls dystre fortid og ildevarslende fremtid.
 					  Et gribende handlingsforløb blandes gnidningsløst med en levende, åndende, ikke-lineær åben verden, som styres af det revolutionerende 'A-Life'-system.
 					  Modelleret nøjagtigt efter virkelige bygninger og steder fra dybt inde i Tjernobyls udelukkelseszone.
 					  Enestående 'Survival FPS'-gameplay - kombinerer action-, snigeri-, overlevelses- og rollespilselementer til en oplevelse uden sidestykke i Zonen.
 					  AI-system til vurdering af fjendetrusler - computerstyrede karakterer reagerer dynamisk på omgivelser og situationer.
 					  Brutalt realistisk kampmekanik - våben har nøjagtige, ballistiske egenskaber og kan modificeres med lyddæmpere og teleskopsigter.
 					  Dynamisk døgn- og vejrsystem påvirker gameplayet direkte.
 					  Avancerede fysiske effekter og dynamiske lyseffekter drevet af den specielle 'X-Ray Engine'.
 					  Intens multiplayer-action, der understøtter op til 32 spillere.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Preparati a entrare nella Zona a tuo rischio e pericolo per fare fortuna. Potresti perfino arrivare a scoprire la verità nascosta nel cuore di Chornobyl!
  * UN'EPICA STORIA NON LINEARE IN UN VASTO MONDO APERTO
 * TANTI NEMICI E CENTINAIA DI COMBINAZIONI DI ARMI 
 * MUTANTI LEGGENDARI CON DIVERSI MODELLI DI COMPORTAMENTO 
 * MANUFATTI DI INCREDIBILE VALORE E ANOMALIE PERICOLOSE 
  Scopri il leggendario universo di S.T.A.L.K.E.R. e troverai!
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco La Zona ti aspetta, un luogo stracolmo di incomprensibili meraviglie e misteriose insidie... un tempo zona di alienazione nei pressi della Centrale Nucleare di Chornobyl. Si tratta di uno dei luoghi più pericolosi della Terra, reso ancor più misterioso in seguito a un oscuro incidente avvenuto nel 2006. Anomalie che custodiscono preziosi reperti, mutanti famelici e avidi criminali hanno invaso questo territorio insieme agli stalker, alla ricerca di una nuova vita ed espedienti per arricchirsi... Diventa uno di loro in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! RICERCA 
 Per sopravvivere, un vero stalker non deve mai smettere di cercare. Solo trovando reperti preziosi, equipaggiamento, rifornimenti, nuovi amici, scorciatoie e risposte agli enigmi più lugubri di questi luoghi potrai riuscire a cavartela. Preparati a lottare per trovare il tuo destino nel centro della Zona, il luogo più protetto dalle intrusioni di ospiti indesiderati. PERICOLO 
 La missione di uno stalker per raggiungere il proprio obiettivo non è certo una passeggiata. Un'anomalia insidiosa, capace di fare a pezzi anche il guerriero più esperto, la presenza di mutanti assetati di sangue o un tradimento inaspettato... sono tutti pericoli in agguato che potrebbero costarti la vita. Preparati a mettere alla prova la tua abilità e la tua intraprendenza, resistendo ai nemici e ai mutanti in soverchiante superiorità numerica. Non abbassare la guardia neppure quando sei solo... Qui nella Zona, nulla è ciò che sembra. DESOLAZIONE 
 Queste terre desolate, avvolte da un autunno senza fine, pullulano di centinaia di vagabondi. Nonostante tutto, lo stalker è sempre solo, pronto a fronteggiare pericoli spesso imprevisti. Ascolta attentamente ogni rumore, pondera ogni singolo passo e non fidarti di niente e di nessuno, fatta eccezione per il tuo contatore Geiger. Solo l'intuizione, unita all'abilità e ai nervi saldi, potranno salvare uno stalker solitario ed evitargli di finire disperso nella Zona.
 
  Caratteristiche di gioco: 
 
   Un mix di azione, furtività, orrore, sopravvivenza ed elementi RPG nell'oscura e fantascientifica ambientazione dell'Europa orientale.
   La peculiare atmosfera di solitudine all'interno di un luogo estremamente pericoloso, dove il tempo si è fermato per sempre.
   Le ambientazioni ricreate nel gioco si basano sulla vera zona di alienazione di Chornobyl: Pripyat, ChNPP e molti altri scenari.
   Nemici e personaggi non giocanti sono dotati di una complessa IA che gli permette di vivere la propria quotidianità e reagire ai cambiamenti.
   Una storia non lineare dove le tue scelte potranno condurti a finali differenti.
   I cambiamenti dinamici nel ciclo giorno-notte e nelle condizioni meteo influiscono sul gameplay.
   Modalità multiplayer con un massimo di 32 giocatori presenti su una singola mappa.

title: #hasicontent
description:
Take fotos of the bunnys in your garden

Hasi (noun) [colloq.]

 German for Bunny

  #hasicontent  is a micro-game about taking photos of wild Bunnys in your garden for your friends on Instagram. 

 Carrots bring all the bunnys to the yard, but they cost you 100 likes. But the Bunnys will tell their friends and more show up in the future.

 The game has no goal. Just watch cute Bunnys for one or two minutes and give them carrots. They'll love it :)

  Controls:

  Move the camera with the Arrow-keys Snap photos with X Throw a carrot with C
  Behind the game:

  My girlfriend and I moved to a new apartment recently and discovered wild  Bunnys in our garden. They were so cute, i had to take photos of them and share them with my friends on Instagram. So i made a tiny game about it. 

 Lo-Fi Bunnys to chill and snap photos to.
